description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 20 (Friday), we held a signing ceremony for an agreement with Sayuri Gakuen school corporation regarding the setup and operation of a welfare evacuation shelter during disasters.

In December of last year, Sayuri Gakuen, which operates Certified Kindergarten Sayuri Yochien, offered to make their facility available as a secondary evacuation site following facility improvements.

During a disaster, Certified Kindergarten Sayuri Yochien can serve as a secondary evacuation destination for infants and young children for whom shelter life at a designated evacuation center would be difficult. This allows us to provide evacuees with a safe and secure environment. After coordinating the details, we reached an agreement on the contract.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13181.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Agreement signed for welfare evacuation shelter setup and operation during disasters
